verse.name: v1
verse.lines: By His stripes we are healed By His nail pierced hands we’re free By His blood, we’re washed clean Now we have the victory.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: The power of sin is broken, Jesus overcame it all, He has won our freedom, Jesus has won it all,

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Hallelujah You have won the victory Hallelujah You have won it all for me

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Death could not hold you down You are the risen king Seated in majesty You are the risen king

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Our God is risen, he is alive he won the victory, he reigns on high
